hooks.command:
input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then content=$(cat /Users/parthchoksi/ai-projects/dota-match-finder/.claude/claude_instructions_template.md 2>/dev/null); prefix='BEFORE PUSHING: You MUST review and verify every item in the deployment checklist below. Do not proceed with the push until all applicable items are confirmed.

'; full_msg="${prefix}${content}"; jq -n --arg ctx "$full_msg" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", additionalContext: $ctx}}'; fi
